content:
RightNow AI has introduced AutoKernel, an open-source framework that automates GPU kernel optimization for PyTorch models. It uses an autonomous agent to profile, optimize, and validate high-performance kernels without human intervention.

• Automatically profiles PyTorch models, identifies bottlenecks using Amdahl's law, and generates optimized Triton or CUDA C++ kernels  
• Achieves up to 5.29x speedup over PyTorch Eager, outperforms torch.compile and beats CUTLASS by up to 2.15x in specific operations  
• Validates every kernel candidate through a rigorous 5-stage correctness harness to ensure accuracy before benchmarking  
• Runs 300+ experiments overnight at ~40 experiments/hour, delivering optimized models with no human in the loop
